---
title: "Team"
pagetitle: "Team — DigiPols"
toc: false
listing:
  - id: directors
    contents:
      - "team/triga.qmd"
      - "team/tsapatsoulis.qmd"
      - "team/tziouvas.qmd"
    sort: false
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
    image-height: "120px"
  - id: associates
    contents:
      - "team/pappa.qmd"
      - "team/gemenis.qmd"
      - "team/ioannides.qmd"
      - "team/charalampous.qmd"
      - "team/sergidou.qmd"
      - "team/manavopoulos.qmd"
      - "team/souropetsis.qmd"
    sort: false
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
    image-height: "120px"
---

## Social scientists & computer scientists working together {style="border-bottom: none;"}

DigiPols brings together researchers from the Cyprus University of Technology. The lab is coordinated by a group of Coordinators and includes a growing group of researchers and PhD candidates.


## Coordinators {style="border-bottom: none;"}

::: {#directors}
:::

## Research Associates {style="border-bottom: none;"}

::: {#associates}
:::

```{=html}
<section style="margin-top:4rem; padding: 2.5rem; border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #D9D6CE); background: #ECE9E2;">
  <p style="font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #565A63; margin: 0 0 1rem;">↳ Open positions</p>
  <h2 style="font-size:1.6rem; margin: 0 0 0.8rem;">Interested in joining the lab?</h2>
  <p style="max-width: 60ch; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.55; color: #1F2228; margin: 0 0 1.2rem;">
    We periodically open positions for PhD candidates, postdoctoral researchers and researchers. Get in touch if your work touches digital politics, computational social science or Voting Advice Applications.
  </p>
  <a class="btn btn-primary" href="mailto:digipols@cut.ac.cy">Contact the lab →</a>
</section>
```
